title: centaurea calabra
intro: Centaurea calabra is a perennial plant species native to southern Italy, classified in the daisy family (Asteraceae) and characterized by its bright yellow flowers and taproot. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues, including wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Centaurea calabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Centaurea calabra can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
